name: Victoria
short_description: Join Victoria on her ghost hunt through the USA. Help her fight against supernatural creatures.
detailed_description:
Join Victoria on her ghost hunt through the USA.
Help her fight against supernatural creatures.

In 10 chapters, Victoria performs in a match-3 game
against the most different supernatural opponents on.
Use different weapons in 100 exciting games Levels.
Collect gold to unlock new weapons and
Salt to ward off jump-scares.

Victoria is the first game of its kind with jump-scares.
A completely new gaming experience!

Features:
  • 100 exciting levels
  • 10 different enemies
  • 8 different weapons
  • 10 different scenarios
  • Frightening jump-scares
  • Creepy atmosphere
